it-ticket-creation: Help me complete an online form
it-ticket-creation-message:
Access the ticket management system at https://eiti.eigent.ai/ and add a new ticket into our system with Browser Agent:

Affected User: Alice Johnson
Assignment Group: Software Services Team
Assigned To: Michael Brown
Priority: 4 – Low | Urgency: 3 – Medium | Impact: 4 – Low
Affected Service: Software Services
Issue: Application Performance Degradation
Description:
The affected user reports slow response times and intermittent timeouts when accessing internal software applications during normal business hours.

Once done, navigate to the "In Progress" tickets list view and extract the visible ticket data from the list (Number, User, Priority, State, Issue columns). Use browser console JavaScript to capture the table data if no export button is available. Save the extracted data as a CSV file.

Finally, generate a statistical report based on the extracted data:
1. Analyze ticket distribution by Priority level (Critical/High/Moderate/Low)
2. Parse any dollar amounts mentioned in the Issue text (e.g., "$50M", "$3.2M") as estimated financial impact
3. Create an HTML report with bar charts showing:
   - Ticket count by Priority
   - Estimated financial impact by Priority (parsed from Issue text)
Include a "Data Notes" section explaining that financial impact values were parsed from Issue description text since no dedicated financial field exists in the system.
bank-transfer-csv-analysis-and-visualiza: Bank Transfer CSV Analysis and Visualization
Create a mock bank transfer CSV file include 10 columns and 10 rows. Read the generated CSV file and summarize the data, generate a chart to visualize relevant trends or insights from the data.
